Blueprint Report #3
Ryan Deiss’ Black Friday Bootcamp 2013
!
Reminder: These Blueprint Reports alternate every other
month with issues of the Marketing Funnels Uncensored Letter -
6 times a year a new Blueprint Report, 6 times a year a new
issue of the Letter.
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 1 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Ryan Deiss is one of the sharpest marketers in the IM community. It goes without
saying that he is someone whose funnels you should pay close attention to and
study.
!
His full 2013 Black Friday Bootcamp was one of the savviest marketing funnels
I’ve seen this year (outside of a handful of my own).
!
In this month’s Blueprint Report I’m not only going to breakdown each of the
steps in the funnel… I’m also going to point out the stealth, under-the-radar
strategies used along the way. (NOTE: It’s these bigger, often-missed
strategies, not the offer sequence, that makes this funnel so magical.)
!
This funnel’s a doozy. And there’s a ton to cover. So let’s get to it…
!
Step #1: The Front-End Offer
!
The funnel begins with a low-cost/low-barrier-of-entry, high-value offer. Below is
the headline and deck copy of the offer:
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 2 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Right off the bat I want you to see this was sold with a long-form sales letter. Not
a video.
!
I believe we’re seeing a resurgence in the use and effectiveness of the good ole
sales letter. Especially for low-cost front-end offers. In fact, in many of our tests,
the sales letter version of our offers is beating out our video sales letters in terms
of conversion rate. Something to note and schedule on your testing calendar.
!
I believe this has a lot to do with speed of consumption.
!
Often, with the way a lot of video sales letters are delivered online, prospects have
no idea how long the video is. So, watching the video requires an unknown level
of time commitment on their part. And even if they are told how long the video is,
they may not be willing to make that specific time commitment right now.
!
Whereas, with a sales letter, a prospect can get the gist of the promise, benefits,
and offer at their own speed and pace. And, often, with a low-cost front-end offer,
skimming and scanning can more often than not give them the information they
need to make a decision.
!
With that being said: Check-out the sub-head used in this sales letter…
! “Announcing, A One-Time Only Internet Bootcamp For
Advanced Marketers Only”
!
The little thing worth noting is the use of the word: Bootcamp.
!
Depending on the niche you operate within, the different words/titles you use to
describe your events come with different pre-conceived notions and ideas.
!
For example: In the IM community there are certain pre-conceived ideas of what
a “webinar” is. Many associate it with something that has a pitch in the end.
!
This is why, as my good friend Rich Schefren said in the Evergreen Event-Driven
Marketing Report published a handful of years ago for our Founders Club
Members, you would be wise to test using different titles/descriptors for your
event.
!
For instance:
!
• Online Summit (used often by Clayton Makepeace)
• Online Conference
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 3 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
• Video Conference
• Video Bootcamp
• Web Conference
• Internet Bootcamp
• Web Bootcamp
• Streaming Webcast
• Streaming Seminar
• Streaming Conference
• Real-Time Webinar
!
Next, I want you to notice a nuance in the main headline. It leverages something
I call Present-Tense Benefitting.
!
Present-tense benefitting is simply presenting a promise in terms of what’s
working right now. Not something that worked before, in the past.
!
Notice the difference in the following two headlines:
! “Would You Like To Ethically Steal Our Proprietary
System That Made Us $30 Million Dollars Per Year?”
!
“Would You Like To Ethically Steal Our Proprietary
System That’s Making Us $30 Million Dollars Per Year?”
!
The difference between the two is in the tense of the verb associated with
the benefit portion.
!
It may seem like semantics, even inconsequential. But, don’t be fooled. Past-
tense benefits allow for prospects to question the current validity and
effectiveness of what’s being presented.
!
In other words, when you talk about something that worked in the past, prospects
automatically question how well it will work now. Hence, it creates an additional
concern/obstacle in the mind of the prospect. This is why you want to leverage
present-tense benefits.
!
Simply put: You want to make sure when you’re presenting a “case study” you’re
talking about what’s working right now… not what’s worked before.
!
That’s exactly what’s being done in this sales letter right in the headline (as well
as the second sentence of the actual letter - see EXHIBIT #1).
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 4 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
!
Next… and this is a biggie…
!
Notice the word “system” used in the headline.
!
I really came to understand the enormous psychological power of offering a
“system” a few years ago thanks to my friend Mark Ford (Michael Masterson) of
Agora.
! Sidenote: If you get this, and utilize it in your own marketing funnels and
offers, it can RADICALLY bump your conversion rates. It’s that powerful.
!
Anytime you’re selling information, guidance, advice, or strategy, when you
bundle it into a “system” it builds instant credibility for your product because
people are inherently inclined to believe in anything that remotely implies it’s
based on science, technology, and/or a repeatable process.
!
As well, presenting your information in the wrapper of a system gives your
prospects a logical reason to justify their temporary suspension of disbelief. In
other words, they are more apt to believe in your big promise when it’s being
delivered by a “system”.
!
As Mark shares, “Anytime you get prospects to say in their mind, ‘Well, it’s
scientifically proven…’ or ‘Hey, there’s system…’ they will have less trouble
justifying the decision to buy.
!
Lastly, as it relates to the power of “the system”… it takes the responsibility of
performance and successful outcome off of the prospect and puts it squarely on
the shoulders of the system. This reduces prospect fear and anxiety over looking
foolish - a biggie when it comes to conversions.
!
This sales letter is not offering strategies, tactics or advice. It’s offering a proven,
tested “system”. Don’t miss the power of this little nuance.
!
Next, look at how they used a unique, substantial proof-point right away in the
first sub-head under the main headline:
! “We threw over 50 million visitors at more than 3,000 split
tests… across websites in 23 different industries. And it cost us
$15 million dollars to do it.”
!
There’s so much going on here the average marketer misses.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 5 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
First off, it’s a proof-point not many other marketers do or could offer. It’s
impressive.
!
Second, the mention of “23 different industries” is used to eliminate the possible
(common) objection from prospects that “this wouldn’t work in my niche”.
!
Third, the mention of the “15 million dollars” in cost demonstrates, implicitly,
that Ryan’s company is successful well beyond the average marketer and in a
position to show marketers how to do the same.
!
They don’t need to scream how successful they are.
!
That dollar amount - just what they invested in testing - conveys it.
!
Make sense?
!
Good.
!
Let’s continue…
!
Next, notice how, right in the deck copy of this sales letter, they tie the offer to
“helping out an amazing charity”.
!
Now, I know Ryan.
!
And I know he’s truly one of the “good guys” out there.
!
So, this is in NO WAY any kind of knock against him:
!
There’s no doubt this tie-in with the charity was done strategically with this
particular offer since the offer was being made right around Thanksgiving - a
time of self-reflection, gratitude, and increased generosity.
!
It not only clearly demonstrates Ryan’s generous nature, it also gives prospects
another, altruistic reason to take advantage of the offer.
!
It gives prospects another easily justifiable reason, at this time of year, to take
advantage of the offer (i.e. participating in a charitable cause).
!
And, of course, by tying the offer with the charity… they were able to leverage a
great endorsement video by William Shatner (the founder of the charity).
Another massive, differentiating credibility element for them.
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 6 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
The next little thing I want to point out with this sales letter is the Reason Why
section toward the bottom.
!
It’s pretty basic stuff, yet critical to this type of offer:
Anytime you make an offer that raises the idea in prospects minds of, “If this is so
good why are you giving it to me?” or “This seems too good to be true”… you
need to give a believable reason why you’re offering it to them. This salesletter
goes on to list out four reasons why they’re making the offer. See EXHIBIT #1.
!
Lastly, and this is something I’ve only recently seen testing data on, you may not
be able to see that every page in this funnel is delivered securely via https://.
!
The test results I’ve seen have shown bumps in conversion from lead generation
pages all the way through to order forms when the web pages are delivered
securely.
!
I believe these bumps are because any added element of security, privacy, and
fraud protection we can give/convey to prospects only helps to boost their
comfort level and confidence in us. It’s certainly something worth you testing.
Now let’s go to the Order Form…
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 7 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Step #2: Order Form
!
The order form is pretty straight-forward. There are just two elements I want you
to take notice of.
!
First, are the small teaser images of the “30 million dollar blueprint” in the
sidebar. These hard-to-see images create crazy curiosity. And convey, again, they
have an actual documented process/system they’ll be giving you.
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 8 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Second, the customer support phone number with office hours, right on the order
form, adds a level of credibility and trust usually not seen in the IM community.
!
Step #3: Upsell
!
!
In this particular funnel, this is where the rubber really meets the road.
!
The upsell is a $297 training program offered via a simple video sales letter page.
!
As with most of Ryan’s videos, this one is masterfully done with lots of strategic
nuances.
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 9 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
First off, the video is congruent with the customer’s experience. Meaning: it picks
up where they just left-off in the ordering process. The video starts by
acknowledging their prior purchase of the front-end offer.
!
Then the video goes on to present the idea of a “secret”. The entire video is built
around the idea that Ryan has a “secret”… really, a “secret system” thanks to his
partner, Perry Belcher… that has been responsible for his company’s meteoric
growth.
!
The video goes on to, first, credentialize the actual “secret selling system” itself.
Then credentializes Perry (the creator of the system).
!
Ryan does this by first sharing what the “secret selling system” has done for his
company (i.e. now generating per month what he was, prior, generating per year).
Then shares how he believed so much in Perry, he gave him half his company to
have him as a partner. Not much else needs to be said in way of proof here.
!
Now, when talking about the “secret selling system” there are a couple of major
points I want you to understand:
!
At no point in the video does Ryan ever share what the system is. He doesn’t hint
at it. Doesn’t allude to what the components are. Doesn’t share a single piece.
Nope. Nothing.
!
This is extremely common when it comes to high-converting “secret-driven”
offers.
!
Fact is: The more prospects know about the “secret” the less compelling,
mysterious, and interesting it is.
!
You will find, with “secret-driven” offers, there is an inverse correlation between
conversion rate and how much you share about the “secret”. The more you share,
the lower your conversion rate will be. The less you share, the higher it will be.
!
What Ryan does share, like all good “secret-driven offers”, are the specific
benefits of the “secret selling system”. He sells prospects on the outcome, the
results of the system. Not the system itself.
!
Next, when talking about the “secret selling system”, Ryan mentions that besides
the clients who have paid Perry $25,000, it’s never been shared before with
anyone else.
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 10 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
This establishes the value of the information and creates a level of exclusivity for
it. As well, without explicitly saying it, this little blurb conveys the idea of an
“opportunity” to get a wildly profitable system few other people know about.
!
Lastly, when talking about the “secret selling system”, Ryan mentions how it
must be followed to the letter. This implicitly conveys that it’s a very specific
system that doesn’t require thinking or decision-making on the part of the
prospect. On the surface it may seem like a negative, but it’s really a hidden
benefit since most prospects simply want to be told exactly what to do.
!
As well, it also conveys that if you think you may know the “secret selling system”,
but make even one deviation, you will likely not get the results you’re hoping for.
So, it increases the need to know the entire system. And, hence, furthers the sale.
!
Later, when talking about Perry, Ryan makes a Damaging Admission (i.e. Perry is
brash at times and not necessarily a gentleman when he speaks). And like with
all good Damaging Admissions, this one allows Ryan to “admit a flaw” in the
training, without that flaw being significant to making the sale.
!
In other words: The damaging admission helps to lower prospects’ sales guard
because it admits a “flaw” in the product, something most sales people aren’t
expected to do, but… it admits a flaw that doesn’t take away from what prospects
care about as it relates to the value of the product. Hence, it doesn’t hurt sales.
!
Immediately after the damaging admission about Perry, Ryan goes on to
credentialize Perry even more. He shares that Perry has been marketing online
for 15 years and in over 400 markets. This little piece of information not only
boosts Perry’s value, it also helps to implicitly overcome a common objection
prospects have (i.e. “this won’t work in my market”).
!
Lastly, Ryan gives two clear reasons to respond to the offer right now: (1) the Beta
Tester discounted price which is far lower than what it will be sold for in the near
future, and (2) to gain first mover advantage over competitors.
!
The last thing I want to mention with this offer is the use of a delayed add-to-cart
button.
!
With our most recent testing data, I’ve found that lower priced upsells perform
better without a delayed add-to-cart button. While higher priced upsells perform
better with a delay.
With this particular button I also want you to see the “No Thanks!” link. It allows
for prospects to continue the ordering process, rather than just leaving the page,
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 11 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
and carries their contact information over (in the URL) to the next page for the
presentation of a one-click downsell offer.
!
Step #4: Downsell
!
The downsell is a simple 3-pay option offered via an on-camera video from Ryan.
!
Just like with the prior upsell offer, this video starts off acknowledging the
prospect’s prior action (i.e. not taking advantage of the upsell offer).
!
Ryan acknowledges the already “extremely low price”, that the price will be going
up much higher in the near future, and how this video is the last time prospects
will see this particular offer and have the opportunity to get the “secret selling
system” at this low price.
!
But, all in all, there’s nothing crazy going on here in this video. It’s a short,
concise video that simply presents the payment option.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 12 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Step #5: Thank You Page
!
It’s this part of the funnel where some extremely savvy things begin to take place.
Prior to the recording of the initial front-end training being available,
immediately upon completing the order, customers were brought to a page with a
training video they were told to watch as homework for the live training.
!
This video was used for two purposes: (1) To presell front-end customers on the
value of the content they would get by attending the live front-end training on
Black Friday, and (2) to presell customers on the value of having Ryan and
Perry’s team create and optimize the prospect’s funnel using their “system”.
!
The video is 99% “pure content” - strategically delivered to create desire for their
system- with a soft pitch in the very end to work with Ryan and Perry.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 13 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
!
Under the video there is a link that says, “Like what you see? Want us to
architect your sales funnel? Click here for more information…”. When
clicked it brings prospects to a PDF sales letter (EXHIBIT #2) that presents the
offer for a free consultation (designed to sell prospects on their funnel creation
services).
!
The PDF is well worth you reading in its entirety. It was written by Frank Kern.
And it does a masterful job of “selling” folks on scheduling a “free” (with $100
deposit) phone consult to learn more about applying their system. Pay close
attention to how Frank overcomes the common objections/concerns typical with
a “free” phone consult offer. And make note of how the offer eliminates all risk
from the prospect and makes it a no-brainer for those interested.
!
Step #6: Delivery Of The Core Training
Okay, now… ordinarily I wouldn’t talk about this part of a funnel. Since, for most
marketers, this part is simply about delivering the product.
!
But, in this case, the main front-end training is a big piece of what makes this
funnel so powerful.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 14 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
The training was an expansion on what was presented in the Thank You Page
Homework video. Well done, quality stuff. But, more or less, simply an
expansion.
!
What was done in this training, that made it such a powerful piece to this puzzle,
is something I teach my Marketing Funnel Automation Partnership Coaching
Clients.
!
They took common sales funnel components (all sound, critical steps to a
winning funnel) and repackaged them with proprietary names, terms and titles.
!
For example:
!
Trip Wire Offer = Front-End Offer
Profit Maximization Sequence = Upsell/Downsell Sequence
Return Path Marketing = Follow-Up Sequence
Core Offer = Primary Backend Offer
!
By packaging these common elements under the umbrella of new names and
titles it allowed them to present something differentiated and unique to the
marketplace.
!
If they would have simply rolled out the training talking about a front-end offer,
an upsell/downsell sequence, a follow-up sequence, etc., many marketers
(especially all of my clients and students) would have seen the training as simply
more of the same. More of what they already know. And certainly not as
something unique and different.
!
In essence, they took something ordinary to a lot of folks and repositioned it and
repackaged it so it can be seen as something extraordinary… as a new and
different proprietary system.
!
Kudos to them for that! It was masterfully executed. And the goal was
accomplished.
!
That is the essence of marketing. Taking something ordinary and repositioning it
so it becomes viewed as something extraordinary.
!
At the end of the training they presented customers with an offer for a
certification program.
!
Now, let me just remind you…
!
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 15 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
This was a paid training. And, yes, at the end of a paid training they made an
offer.
!
A lot of marketers shy away from doing this for one reason or another.
!
But, like I talked about in last month’s MFU Letter, product development and
delivery should always fall under the marketing category. Meaning: When you’re
creating and delivering products, you’re still marketing. You should always be
setting up the sale for the next product in your funnel. Even going as far as to
make an offer in the delivery of the product.
!
If you take a step back and look at this funnel as a whole you’ll see that they
actually made multiple offers throughout and had a lot more monetization points
than the typical funnel.
!
They had: (1) the front-end offer, (2) the upsell offer, (3) the downsell offer, (4)
the funnel creation offer at the end of the Homework video, (5) the funnel
creation offer on the Thank You Page, (6) the certification offer at the end of the
training, (7) the certification offer on the Replay page.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 16 of 50 --

Marketing Funnels Uncensored - Blueprint Report #3
Some Final Points:
!
On the surface, to the average marketer, this funnel and offer sequence seems
average and ordinary. There’s a front-end offer, an upsell sequence, the delivery
of a product, and a backend offer.
!
But, the magic behind this funnel lies within the content of those steps. Most
specifically, within the delivery of the “training content” and how the messaging
was designed.
!
More than anything, what I want you to grasp is the way the main offer and
upsell was positioned and presented as a “secret system”. And then the way they
presented that “secret system” with unique names and titles to differentiate it and
create desire for their main training and/or their done-for-you service.
!
The entire process from “marketing” to “product delivery” was ALL
constructed and delivered as one big savvy marketing funnel.
!
Even the $297 upsell training - also more or less an expansion on the Homework
video and main training - was designed and delivered in a way that created more
desire for customers to want to learn more (i.e. the main backend offer) or to
have Perry and Ryan do it for them (i.e. done-for-them service).
!
It was one big gigantic sales machine from beginning to end and all throughout.
!
I tip my hat to these guys and to this funnel. As should you.
!
Creating a funnel like this requires you think at a different level than most
average marketers do.
!
You not only need to think through how to position your product uniquely in the
marketplace, how to present a compelling “argument” for your product, and how
to present a compelling, superior offer…
!
…you also need to think through how to present and deliver your product in a
way that creates desire and demand for the next product in your sequence, and
does so in a way that presents you with additional monetization opportunities
throughout the entire process.
!
Do that and you’ll have a funnel that makes you more money than you ever
imagined! More money than you thought any one funnel would ever bring you.
Copyright 2013 - MarketingFunnelAutomation.com 	ALL RIGHTS RESERVED

-- 17 of 50 --

-- 19 of 50 --

Ryan Deiss
Frank Kern
From: Ryan Deiss
Friday, November 22nd
Happy Holidays,
First of all, yes.
Yes – this is for real. Yes – it’s working like crazy and is, quite
literally, going to be the future of your business.
And yes – you’re really getting it all for $7. No catch, no tricks,
no hidden strings attached.
But before we go further, let me make something abundantly
clear:
This isn’t one of those “get rich quick” websites that promises
you a fortune for doing nothing. Here’s the deal. Our formula is
working great for us, and I believe it can help you, too.
But I’m not suggesting that everyone (or anyone) who reads this
and takes advantage of Friday’s special live bootcamp is going to

-- 20 of 50 --

make thirty million per year. I don’t know how much the people
who listen in will make – it’s likely that many or most of them will
make little or nothing at all (especially if they don’t follow
through with what we teach them).
With that said … let me jump right in and show you …
Exactly W
hat You’ll Be Getting
First of all, you need to know this isn’t like other online boot camps
you might have attended.
There’s no stories about our humble beginnings (that nobody
cares about). And there’s no sales pitch (that nobody wants to sit
through).
This is 100% pure, uncensored, HARD CORE marketing content
…specifically for “A-Players” who want to absolutely crush it in
2014.
Here’s a fraction of what you’re getting…

-- 21 of 50 --

The one thing you can do to instantly get more leads,
subscribers, and ultimately …customers. (Hint: It has
NOTHING to do with your ad, your headline, your landing
page, or your copy.)
Think it’s all about the marketing? Think again! You’ll discover
how one author went from less than 5,000 books sold …to
selling 2.5 MILLION …just by changing one simple thing!
Want a better list with more buyers on it? We’ll show you the
simple tweak we made for a water filtration company that
brought in a 2,000% increase in leads!
Want a 6-20% bump in conversions? Forget fiddling with your
copy, and don’t touch your headlines. Instead, let me show you
how I changed one letter on a “hidden” part of my websites …
and instantly improved conversion!
We thought it was DEAD! But when we deployed this one
step in the formula to one of our newer businesses, we ended
up with $188,674.00 in sales from one little promotion!
(NOTE: It wasn’t a launch and there were no JV’s involved.)
I thought we’d lose our shirts! But I was wrong. In this case

-- 22 of 50 --

study, you’ll see how we’re making an absolute fortune by
giving away real physically shipped products for free.
(URGENT: The first one to do this in any
marketplace wins. Will it be you or your
competition?)
UNPLUG YOUR COMPUTER! Sounds crazy? Get this:
You’re getting a detailed case study showing how one of our
businesses “installed” a $21,300.00 per month income
stream …just by standing around at a trade show and handing
out flyers!
(I’m telling you …our proprietary process has worked in every
situation we’ve tested so far. Let’s test it in yours, too!)
This might sound crazy, but FORGET ABOUT CONVERSION
RATES! Yes! There’s something way more important and it’s
called “process”. You’ll see how three simple changes to your
marketing process can literally double your buyers and

-- 23 of 50 --

revenue. (Complete with case studies and examples.)
They don’t know about this and let’s PRAY THEY NEVER FIND
OUT!
There’s one little piece of every business that everyone
ignores. But this is where the money is! You’ll discover what
it is, and the simple tweak we tested for an instant 98%
increase in sales. (NOTE: This takes roughly six minutes to
deploy.)
What is that man doing?? We added a simple (but weird)
picture of a man engaged in a strange activity on the main page
of our sports business.
The result? 80% bump! You’ll see the picture and more
importantly – instantly “get” the logic behind it so you can test
one of your own.
“Shut up you fools!” Don’t you just hate it when famous gurus
show stuff that’s working for them …and you know the only
reason it’s working is because they’re a famous guru and the
odds are already “stacked” in their favor? Me too!!

-- 24 of 50 --

That’s why you’re coming behind the scenes of an unknown
and tiny industrial equipment website that sells heat
sealers.

Because we (literally) doubled their revenue by adding one
little “twist” to their sales process …and we want to show
you how to test it in your business too. (Hey – if it works for a
weird little “heat sealer” website, don’tcha think you might be
able to make it work for you, too?)
NO FREAKIN’ WAY! That’s what I yelled into the phone when I
heard the news. See, I added three simple words to the “thank
you” page that customers saw after they purchased a product
…and those words (combined with the offer that followed)
added $453,000.00 in additional revenue to the business!

you might structure a similar offer on your “thank you” pages
too.

And like so many other business, we hit our share of roadblocks. In fact, for the
